results.description: Baseline - original verbose skill with 10 supporting files
Removed 10 unnecessary files, compressed SKILL.md from 296 lines to 38 lines
results.notes: debug-race failure was model variance (broken mutex implementation), not skill regression

results.description: Re-run of iteration 1 to confirm variance hypothesis

changes: Removed 10 unnecessary files: test-academic.md, test-pressure-1.md, test-pressure-2.md, test-pressure-3.md, CREATION-LOG.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, condition-based-waiting.md, defense-in-depth.md, root-cause-tracing.md
Compressed SKILL.md from 296 lines (~10KB) to 38 lines (~1KB) - removed verbose examples, rationalizations table, red flags section, and supporting technique references
Retained core 4-phase debugging process in concise format
